function.message: Processed the oldest inbox item by OCR-normalizing the four existing requested purchase records into schema-compliant YAML frontmatter and then deleting the inbox file. The additionally requested path `50_finance/purchases/_2026_03_02__eur_000036__bill__family_map_wall_board.md` was not present, so there was no fifth file to process.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, inspected 99_system before task work, used inbox-processing and OCR/migration workflows, preserved original note bodies under new frontmatter, and deleted the inbox item only after successful completion. I did not cite the missing underscored file as a grounding ref because it was never successfully read.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/724_next-task.md asked to OCR five listed purchase paths. The four existing purchase notes each visibly contained all required bill fields and line items needed by 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, so adding YAML frontmatter to those existing files satisfied the task. A direct read of the fifth underscored path returned file not found, so there was no sandbox record there to OCR.
completed_steps_laconic: attempted read of underscored fifth path (not found)
